task_name: Per-workspace realtime, presence, and removal events

concerns_addressed: Cycle-1 Critical (routes.ts:1294 SSE not membership-gated) — RESOLVED: /workspaces/:workspaceId/events/stream now calls lookupMembership and returns 404 for non-members before sseHandler (routes.ts:1290-1293). Verified parallel presence routes (heartbeat routes.ts:1253, GET presence routes.ts:1266) are also membership-gated; DELETE presence clears caller's own key only — no cross-workspace leak.

Cycle-1 Minor (unused getWorkspaceOwner in WorkspaceAccessDeps) — RESOLVED: WorkspaceAccessDeps type (routes.ts:161-185) and production wiring (routes.ts:230-261) contain no getWorkspaceOwner; replaced by getTargetMembership which is legitimately used by checkCanRemoveUser owner-guard. Test file matches the new dep shape exactly (workspaceAccess.test.ts:76-83).

Cycle-1 Minor (unused userId in connectLocalClient) — RESOLVED: signature is connectLocalClient({ workspaceId }: { workspaceId: number }) (realtime.ts:124); userId removed. Test updated to match (realtime.test.ts:11-12).
DELIVERABLE 1 (oscar SSE WS-A, card in WS-B not received) — verified by fanOut workspace filter (realtime.ts:95-104).
DELIVERABLE 2 (Redis down, local fan-out WS-B event not refreshing WS-A) — verified: local fan-out path applies same workspace filter (realtime.ts:146).
DELIVERABLE 3 (nina removed from WS-R emits membership.removed for WS-R) — verified at routes.ts:219-224.
DELIVERABLE 4 (nina viewing WS-S, removed from WS-R, no WS-S event) — verified: event published only to removal workspace; test asserts not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(9, ...) (workspaceAccess.test.ts:93).

strengths: Clean dependency-injection seam: createRealtimeHub and createWorkspaceAccessService keep DB/Express out of testable logic, consistent with the existing core/ pure-function convention.

Workspace isolation enforced uniformly across both Redis pub/sub (workspaceEventChannel) and local fan-out (fanOut workspace filter), satisfying the sandwich-context invariant that Redis-down fallback still filters by workspace.
Redis graceful degradation preserved: publishEvent falls through to local fan-out on publish failure (realtime.ts:138-146); presence operations are best-effort with swallowed errors.
All presence and stream routes consistently membership-gated via lookupMembership with uniform 400/404 handling.
9 tests pass; tests assert behavior (isolation, channel naming, scoped publish, no cross-workspace event) rather than merely executing.
